textByHash.774f68e26ef70b3345c469ef6d14ddeb94b8ed6f: Cor blimey mate, what are ye doing in me pockets?
textByHash.da1e6444febd56425a7bb91fe14293539e5b013e: Well, the work is going well, so I'm very good, thank you.
textByHash.9cd76418591b1581423a2b7b820b85288313990d: Nilsal! I'm pretty good, thank you. It's always nice to be out in the sun.
textByHash.b97640bc7e5625fb014f93e6a1613ba55a83e76e: Hello there! Nice weather we've been having. Perfect for a day outdoors!
